name: git-scm
description: Built-in VS Code-style Source Control panel: stage, commit, push/pull, and diff view (bundled — see extensions/build.mjs).

gitScm.pollInterval.description: How often (ms) to poll the active directory's git status, kept running in the background so the sidebar badge stays current even when the SOURCE CONTROL panel isn't open. 0 disables polling — status only refreshes on the refresh button, active-directory change, and after an operation.

gitScm.clickAction.description: What clicking a file in the SOURCE CONTROL panel opens. Shift+click always opens the other one.
